name: Backend API Main
description: FastAPI application entry point for centaur.tools API - a community-governed registry for AI tools with provenance tracking. Assembles routers for auth, feed, forum, notifications, provenance, registry, search, users, and voting subsystems, configures cookie-based authentication dependency override, and exposes a health check endpoint.

functions.name: health
functions.description: Health check endpoint that returns a static success response indicating the API is operational.
postconditions: Returns dictionary with 'status' key set to 'ok'

invariants: FastAPI app instance initialized with title='centaur.tools API', version='1.0.0'
Dependency override maps placeholder_get_current_user to real_get_current_user for cookie-based auth
Nine routers included in fixed order: auth, feed, users, registry, search, voting, provenance, forum, notifications

data_access.rationale: Main module performs no direct data access; delegates to registered routers

authority.rationale: Owns the health check endpoint and application initialization/configuration
